scripts.build: npm run build --workspace @ckb-escrow/sdk && npm run build --workspace @ckb-escrow/ccc-adapter
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck --workspace @ckb-escrow/sdk && npm run typecheck --workspace @ckb-escrow/ccc-adapter
scripts.test: npm run test --workspace @ckb-escrow/sdk && npm run test --workspace @ckb-escrow/ccc-adapter
